title: Netmeds is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Netmeds is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Netmeds invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Netmeds:
Netmeds is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds!
